mission.title: podman-container-tools: [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255 on Mac
mission.description: [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255 on Mac. This issue affects 21+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Issue Description

There seems to be an issue when trying to start Podman with `podman machine start` when using macOS and QEMU. I created a Podman machine about two months ago but now the machine fails to start.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255…
steps.description:
Took a look at this and I'm still struggling to find a correct solution - This error code definitely comes from a [failed SSH call](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/03578810759b35e9f15e4452a29d8667f1fcced1/pkg/machine/qemu/machine.go#L688) during the while mounting directories into the VM
```yaml
podman machine start 
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Mounting volume... /Users/me:/Users/me
Error: exit status 255
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Took a look at this and I'm still struggling to find a correct solution - This error code definitely comes from a [failed SSH call](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/03578810759b35e9f15e4452a29d8667f1fcced1/pkg/machine/qemu/machine.go#L688) during the while mounting directories into the VM during the start.  The solutions above indicate that it's a race condition, however, we do
codeSnippets:
podman machine start 
Starting machine "podman-machine-default"
Waiting for VM ...
Mounting volume... /Users/me:/Users/me
Error: exit status 255

netstat -ap tcp | grep -i listen
tcp4       0      0  localhost.50810        *.*                    LISTEN

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
